hero.title: Stay, thoughtfully.
hero.description: Boutique stays shaped by thoughtful spaces, soulful details and experiences worth remembering.

introduction.title: More than a place to stay.
introduction.text: Livoraa creates thoughtfully designed stays that feel personal, considered and connected to the character of each destination.

staysSection.title: Spaces with a sense of place.
staysSection.description: Discover distinctive stays designed around comfort, character and thoughtful hospitality.

pillars.title: Thoughtful Spaces
pillars.text: Every Livoraa stay is shaped with intention, balancing comfort, character and a strong sense of place.

pillars.title: Personal Hospitality
pillars.text: Warm, attentive and uncomplicated hospitality designed to make every stay feel effortless.

pillars.title: Local Connection
pillars.text: Experiences and recommendations that help guests discover the spirit and culture of each destination.

conciergeSection.title: Your stay, thoughtfully arranged.
conciergeSection.text: From local recommendations to special requests, our concierge approach helps make every journey more personal and effortless.

instagramSection.title: Life at Livoraa.
instagramSection.text: Stories, spaces and moments from our stays and the destinations around them.

bookingCta.title: Find your next stay.
bookingCta.text: Discover thoughtfully designed spaces and memorable experiences with Livoraa.
